pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C. It's a bit nerve-wracking being in a room with so many strangers, isn't it? What's your name?
Hey C, I'm B. It definitely is a bit tense, but I guess we're all just here for the same reason. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too, B. Exactly, we're all eyeing that prize. What would you do with the money if you won?
Honestly, I’d use it to help out my family and get some things back home sorted. It would mean a lot to us. What about you?
Same here. I've got people at home I really want to help out; this money would be a massive game-changer for all of us.
I totally get that. It’s a lot of pressure, but it makes it worth it. Have you talked to any of the others yet?
Not really, you're the first person I've actually talked to properly. It's a little intimidating to just jump in, you know?
I definitely feel that. It's a weird situation to be in, but I'm glad we started talking—makes it feel a bit more normal.
I agree, it definitely helps take the edge off. Do you have any kind of plan yet, or are you just going to see how the game goes?
Honestly, I’m just trying to get a feel for everyone first. It's hard to have a solid plan until we know exactly how the game works. What about you?
I'm in the same boat. Just trying to stay observant for now. I think I'm going to go mingle and see what the others are like, but it was really good talking to you, B. Good luck!
Likewise, C! It was great meeting you. Good luck with the others, and hopefully we can catch up again soon.

post_game.message: Great job sticking to the fair share. It's refreshing to see everyone cooperate so perfectly for an equal split.
I completely agree. It was a pleasure to cooperate and ensure we both walked away with a fair share.
